ns0:entry.ns0:title: Foundry376/Mailspring
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Foundry376/Mailspring
Language: javascript
💌 A beautiful, fast and fully open source mail client for Mac, Windows and Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ToolJet/ToolJet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ToolJet/ToolJet
Language: javascript
ToolJet is the open-source foundation of ToolJet AI - the AI-native platform for building internal tools, dashboard, business applications, workflows and AI agents 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/atlassian/atlassian-mcp-server
Language: javascript
Remote MCP Server that securely connects Jira and Confluence with your LLM, IDE, or agent platform of choice.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: decolua/9router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/decolua/9router
Language: javascript
Connect All AI Code Tools (Claude Code, Cursor, Antigravity, Copilot, Codex, Gemini, OpenCode, Cline, OpenClaw...) to 40+ AI Providers & 100+ Models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gsd-build/get-shit-done
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gsd-build/get-shit-done
Language: javascript
A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/nuclei-templates
Language: javascript
Community curated list of templates for the nuclei engine to find security vulnerabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: songquanpeng/one-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/songquanpeng/one-api
Language: javascript
LLM API 管理 & 分发系统，支持 OpenAI、Azure、Anthropic Claude、Google Gemini、DeepSeek、字节豆包、ChatGLM、文心一言、讯飞星火、通义千问、360 智脑、腾讯混元等主流模型，统一 API 适配，可用于 key 管理与二次分发。单可执行文件，提供 Docker 镜像，一键部署，开箱即用。LLM API management & key redistribution system, unifying multiple providers under a single API. Single binary, Docker-ready, with an English UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zhaoolee/ChromeAppHeroes
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zhaoolee/ChromeAppHeroes
Language: javascript
🌈谷粒-Chrome插件英雄榜, 为优秀的Chrome插件写一本中文说明书, 让Chrome插件英雄们造福人类~ ChromePluginHeroes, Write a Chinese manual for the excellent Chrome plugin, let the Chrome plugin heroes benefit the human~ 公众号「0加1」同步更新
